name: Asparagus n' Bacon Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop 6 spears of cooked asparagus.
2. In a small bowl, combine eggs, salt, half & half and chopped asparagus.
3. Sprinkle bacon and shredded cheese into the bottom of partially cooked pie crust shell.
4. Pour egg mixture over bacon and cheese.
5. Arrange remaining whole asparagus spears in a spoke fashion on top of egg mixture.
6. Bake at 375 degrees for 35 minutes or until knife comes out clean and top is golden brown.
